title: Sink Drainer Plug Hair Catcher – Stainless Steel Shower Drain Cover, Bath Plug Hole Strainer, Kitchen Sink Hole Cover, Drain Filter Stopper for Hair and Food Debris – 7.7cm (90 Hole) 2pk
features: FITS MOST KITCHEN & BATHROOM SINKS – Outer diameter 7.7cm and inner diameter 3.9cm fits standard sinks in kitchens, bathrooms, and utility areas with no adjustments needed.
KEEPS DRAINS FLOWING FREELY – Fine mesh traps food waste and hair without slowing water drainage. Prevents unpleasant smells and sink blockages.
NO TOOLS OR INSTALLERS NEEDED – Simply place into your sink – no mess, no hassle. It stays in place and works straight away in both kitchen and bathroom setups.
STRONG & LONG-LASTING MATERIAL – Built from high-quality stainless steel that resists rust, withstands pressure, and holds up to daily use.
EASY TO CLEAN & SAFE TO HANDLE – No sharp edges. Rinse or tap to clear debris. Safe on hands and won't damage your sink surface.
description: We are devoted to making your home feel the more clean and non-dirty smell. So we are decided to provide you with a new kitchen/Bath sink strainer set. You will save money and get a high-quality product. Quality and Durability : The sink drain catcher is made of premium stainless steel that is not deformed and rust free, fits most sink drains and garbage disposals. Easy to Clean: The stainless steel plug hole drain cover will not be blocking the flow of water, making your sink easier to clean. Just remove the basket to empty, no need to install sophisticated systems for sink drain and it’s also dishwasher safe. Proficient Anti-Clogging: Smooth edge will not scratch your hands or damage your sinks. A perfect tool to keep hair, residues, debris from clogging your sink drains. Make your housework at ease, and make the world cleaner. If you have any questions about the product, please do not hesitate to contact us we are here for care and assistance!
